title: Can You Spot a Real Order Block? 🧠 ICT Quiz
description: Think you know your order blocks? Most traders get this wrong — and it's costing them funded accounts. Test yourself and find out where you really stand. Follow R2F Trading for daily ICT concepts that actually make sense.
script: Quick quiz. 73% of traders fail this. What MAKES a valid order block? Think fast. Is it: A — any big candle. B — the last candle before a big move. C — a support level. Which one? It's B. The LAST candle before the impulse move. That's the order block. Everything else is just noise. Miss this and you're trading blindfolded. Follow R2F Trading. New quizzes every day.
